title: Cost of Living Calculator
description: Compare cost of living between any two US cities. Free, instant, data-driven.
content:

These cities are in different countries. Each index is relative to its own country's national average (100 = country average). Direct percentage comparisons are approximate and should be used as a general reference only.

How It Works

Our calculator uses official data from the Council for Community and Economic Research (C2ER) to compare costs across categories:

  • Housing — Rent and home prices
  • Groceries — Food and household items
  • Utilities — Electricity, gas, water, internet
  • Transportation — Gas, public transit, car insurance
  • Healthcare — Insurance and out-of-pocket costs
  • Miscellaneous — Entertainment, clothing, personal care

Data Sources

  • Council for Community and Economic Research (C2ER)
  • US Bureau of Labor Statistics
  • Zillow Research

Last updated: June 28, 2026
